channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lautaro Martinez sets Champions League goals record for Inter Milan in 2-0 win at Feyenoord
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Lautaro Martinez became Inter Milan's all-time leading scorer in the Champions League on Wednesday in a 2-0 win for the Italian giant against Feyenoord.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lightning acquire Gourde and Bjorkstrand and Panthers get Vanecek as NHL trade action heats up
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning have answered the cross-state-rival and defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers' first couple of additions ahead of the NHL trade deadline with a big move of their own.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: College hoops is full of versatile big men who could bust brackets in March Madness
item.description: Danny Wolf moves with the freedom of a guard in a 7-footer's body, bursting off screens for catch-and-shoot 3-pointers, beating defenders off the dribble, using his vision to find open teammates over smaller players.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NASCAR countersues 23XI and Front Row, as well as Michael Jordan's manager, in dispute over charters
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — NASCAR's revenue-sharing charter system is under threat of being disbanded, according to a Wednesday counterclaim filed by the stock car series against Michael Jordan-owned 23XI Racing and Front Row Motorsports that singles out Jordan's longtime business manager.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Rookie No. 1 pick Macklin Celebrini stays upbeat in finding positives amidst Sharks' losing season
item.description: BUFFALO, N.Y. (AP) — Rookie center Macklin Celebrini has been steadfast in staying upbeat amidst a losing season in which the young, rebuilding San Jose Sharks are in jeopardy of finishing last in the NHL standings for a second consecutive year.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Is the end approaching for Arizona State coach Bobby Hurley? It’s difficult to see a path forward
item.description: The Sun Devils are facing a complicated decision on coach Bobby Hurley, whose record exceeds the historical standard in Tempe.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: 7 stand trial over cyber death threats against Paris Olympics artistic director
item.description: PARIS (AP) — The trial of seven people charged in connection with alleged cyberbullying targeting the artistic director of last summer’s Paris Olympics’ opening and closing ceremonies has started in a Paris court.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bengals' Sam Hubbard retires from NFL at 29
item.description: Cincinnati Bengals defensive end Sam Hubbard announced on Wednesday he will retire from the NFL after only seven seasons. He is 29 years old.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Travis Kelce dishes on reasons for Chiefs return after retirement rumors
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs star tight end Travis Kelce talked about his reasoning for returning for his 13th NFL season amid retirement rumors on his podcast.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chiefs trading All-Pro offensive guard Joe Thuney to Bears for 2026 4th-round pick, AP source says
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — The Kansas City Chiefs are trading two-time All-Pro guard Joe Thuney to the Chicago Bears for a fourth-round pick in the 2026 draft, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chris Collins shares special basketball bond with son Ryan at Northwestern
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. - Two hours before tipoff Monday at Welsh-Ryan Arena, Ryan Collins had the ball in his hands, showing off his shot, a similar scene to another coach’s son some four decades earlier. “He shows off before the game, just like I used to do,” said Northwestern head coach Chris Collins.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James becomes first to score 50,000 combined points in NBA regular season and playoffs
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James is well on his way to rewriting every previous definition of basketball longevity, and the 40-year-old star is now racking up numbers the NBA has never seen before.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Suns' Kevin Durant, coach Mike Budenholzer share intense moment in comeback win over Clippers
item.description: Phoenix Suns star Kevin Durant and head coach Mike Budenholzer shared an intense moment during the team's comeback win over the Los Angeles Clippers on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ron DeSantis chirps at Canada's 'boycott' of Florida, country's Stanley Cup drought
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis took his own shot at Canada on Tuesday, throwing a jab at the country's 32-year-old Stanley Cup drought.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Andy Cohen faces backlash in trans athlete debate with Meghan McCain and teen brain-damaged by trans opponent
item.description: Bravo TV star Andy Cohen was criticized Tuesday after getting into an X debate with Meghan McCain and a teenager who was injured by a trans athlete.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Flo Rida set to perform postgame concert at Rate Field this summer
item.description: Flo Rida will perform at a postgame concert at Rate Field following the White Sox game versus the San Francisco Giants on Friday, June 27 at 6:40 p.m. CT, with on-field Postgame Concert passes available to single-game ticket purchasers and White Sox season ticket holders.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Bears to send 6th-round draft pick to Rams for veteran OL Jonah Jackson
item.description: Offensive line is generally considered the Bears' biggest position of need this offseason. They're reportedly addressing that before free agency even begins by agreeing to trade for a player familiar with new head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Shoeless Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks hit auction
item.description: NEW YORK (WGN) — A pair of scrapbooks belonging to "Shoeless" Joe Jackson are up for bid over the next two weeks. Offered by Leland's Auctions, up for bid is a collection of Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks obtained directly from Jackson's family.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Jordan Howlett, of the Fast Foods Secrets Club, returns to Oceanside High School
item.description: You may have seen Oceanside alum Jordan Howlett before while scrolling through your social media feed. Telling his over 25 million viewers on Instagram and TikTok to, "Come here," before he reveals the secret recipes of everyone's fast food favorites as part of his Fast Food Secrets Club.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Celtics honor Somerset teen who saved choking girl
item.description: Ben Courville, a junior firefighter with the Dighton Fire Department, saved a girl last summer from choking at a Fall River restaurant.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: Bulls guard, Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu to have shoulder surgery, out for season, team announces
item.description: CHICAGO — The 2024-25 season is over for Bulls guard and Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu. The team announced Sunday morning the fourth-year player and former University of Illinois star will undergo left shoulder surgery and will miss the rest of the season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Runnin' Utes trounce Arizona State, 99-73
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Ezra Ausar scored 25 points and Utah put up 58 points in the second half to pull away from Arizona State to earn its first win under interim coach Josh Eilert, 99-73 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bountiful 3-peats with another 5A state title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Bountiful girls basketball team has built a true dynasty. The Redhawks knocked off previously undefeated West High to win its third straight state championship Friday night at the Huntsman Center, 57-47.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lone Peak wins fourth straight state championship
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The dynasty continues for the Lone Peak girls basketball team. The Knights won their fourth straight state championship Thursday beating Copper Hills for a second straight year, 46-42.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bay Area rap legend to perform at Oakland Roots opener
item.description: (KRON) -- Bay Area rap icon Too Short has been announced as the halftime entertainment for the Oakland Roots Soccer Club's home opener next month. The Roots will play their 2025 season opener on Saturday, March 22 against San Antonio FC.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: RSL eliminated from Champions Cub with 2-1 loss
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake failed to advance to the Round of 16 of the 2025 CONCACAF Champions Cup with a 2-1 home loss against CS Herediano on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
